summary: Smart Notes IA tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests pass (health, 13 categories, AI classification incl. Véhicules+Finances+urgent for 'Payer assurance camion avant jeudi', heuristic 'amende impôts urgent', no-urgency 'Acheter du lait', empty payload 400, list/filter/search/category/single GET, status lifecycle todo→in_progress→done, urgent toggle, DELETE→404, dashboard shape, OCR with real-content JPEG returns ocr_text). Frontend: dashboard renders, FAB opens QuickCaptureSheet, note creation flow works, sheet auto-closes, notes-screen filter chips (urgent/status/cat) tap correctly, note detail status segmented control + toggle-urgent work, search-screen filters live (8 results for 'camion'). One web-only regression: delete-btn on note detail does NOT delete because Alert.alert with confirm/cancel buttons does not fire onPress on react-native-web.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button uses Alert.alert with two-button confirm. On react-native-web, multi-button Alert.alert does NOT invoke onPress callbacks (known RNW limitation). Result: tapping delete-btn shows nothing on web and the note is never deleted. Works on Android.

react_native_issues.issue: Console emits non-blocking deprecation warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Fix delete on web: in app/note/[id].tsx onDelete, branch on Platform.OS — use window.confirm() on web or a custom Modal-based confirmation dialog. Example: if (Platform.OS === 'web') { if (window.confirm('Supprimer la note ?')) { await deleteNote(note.id); router.back(); } } else { Alert.alert(...) }
Optional: replace deprecated style props (shadow* → boxShadow on web; props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents) to silence warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/notes empty-payload check happens AFTER OCR call when image_base64 is empty string '': harmless (passes through), but the fast-fail 400 only triggers when both content and OCR result are empty. Fine.
/api/dashboard returns Note(**n).model_dump() lists which is correct (no _id leakage).
classify_note JSON parsing strips ```json fences correctly; also has heuristic fallback OR'd with model output — robust.
Frontend QuickCaptureSheet correctly handles empty input alert and AI loading spinner.
seed_data_creation: A handful of test notes were created via the API during pytest runs and via the UI ('Test note frontend playwright'). Class-scoped cleanup deletes most; a few may persist (used to validate dashboard/list).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL is https://smart-capture-ai-2.preview.emergentagent.com (taken from /app/frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — note: the URL in the original review_request was stale). Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_smart_notes.py for regression. For frontend testing of buttons that may render below mobile viewport (390x844), use element.dispatch_event('click') instead of page.click() because RN-web layouts often place CTAs below the fold even though they are tappable on actual devices. The delete-btn issue is specifically the Alert.alert RNW limitation — verify the fix by tapping delete-btn and confirming via window.confirm dialog handler.
rca_of_issue: Delete on web fails because react-native-web's Alert.alert implementation falls back to window.alert (single-button), and its multi-button signature does not invoke the onPress handlers. Reproduction: open any note detail in the web preview, tap the trash icon → no confirmation appears and the note is not deleted. Mitigation: branch with Platform.OS === 'web' and use window.confirm(), OR render a custom Modal-based confirmation dialog that works cross-platform.
